case_title: CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. RAASSI & ASSOCIATES INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMININSTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT RAASSI & ASSOCIATES INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA CHAKRA SALOM SPA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
